criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings, tabs, and section titles (Diff, Compare Branches, Blame, Graph, Export tabs), they use consistent capitalization throughout.
criteria.reasoning: Sentence-case headings and tabs are used consistently across the visible studio UI. Evidence: copy-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they are specific verbs such as Compare branches, Complete merge, Restore version, Ignore whitespace, Export, Import, Copy, and Download — not generic Submit or OK when a specific label is possible.
criteria.reasoning: Actions use specific labels including Export, Restore version, Import, Copy, Download, and Compare branches. Evidence: copy-export-shared.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders blocking or error messages, they name the field or problem and the fix — unresolved conflict count, bodyMarkdown length, changeNote required, schemaVersion prompt-diff-package-v1 — not just Invalid.
criteria.reasoning: The restore validation message identifies the required field and fix: “changeNote is required and must name the restore source version.” Evidence: copy-error-shared.png

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty states (no search matches, no-differences self-compare), the copy explains what belongs there or that the versions are identical.
criteria.reasoning: No empty-state surface was rendered during the observed workflows, so there was no empty-state copy failing this criterion. Evidence: copy-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders seeded prompt content, change notes, and author names, they read as plausible product data free of spelling and grammatical errors.
criteria.reasoning: Seeded prompt text, change notes, and author names are coherent, plausible, and grammatically clean. Evidence: copy-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for version, merge, annotation, export, and package, terminology stays consistent across the rail, header, Export surface, and toasts.
criteria.reasoning: Version, branch, export, package, prompt, and annotation terminology remains consistent across the rail, editor, and export dialog. Evidence: copy-export-shared.png

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders version numbers, relative timestamps, and counter integers, formatting is consistent across pickers, history rows, and Export previews.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The same dates use different formats across surfaces: relative dates in pickers, localized dates in history rows, and ISO timestamps in the export preview. Evidence: copy-export-shared.png

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation and success messages for merge, restore, export, and import, they state what happened rather than vague affirmations.
criteria.reasoning: No vague confirmation or success-message surface was rendered; the visible export surface itself is specifically labeled with its artifact type and format. Evidence: copy-export-shared.png

criteria.name: placeholder_copy_is_visible
criteria.description: Lorem ipsum or placeholder text (TODO, Lorem, asdf, or template variable names such as {{title}}) is visible anywhere in the shipped UI.
criteria.reasoning: No Lorem ipsum, TODO, asdf, or template-variable placeholder text was observed. Evidence: copy-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: prominent_copy_has_errors
criteria.description: Spelling or grammatical errors appear in prominent copy such as headings, mode tabs, or primary buttons.
criteria.reasoning: No spelling or grammatical errors were observed in prominent headings, tabs, or primary buttons. Evidence: copy-initial-shared.png

criteria.name: concept_names_are_inconsistent
criteria.description: The same concept is named inconsistently across surfaces (for example Version package in one place and Prompt dump in another).
criteria.reasoning: No inconsistent naming for versions, merges, annotations, exports, or packages was observed across the visible surfaces. Evidence: copy-export-shared.png

criteria.name: copy_is_truncated_or_overflowing
criteria.description: Truncated or overflowing text renders change notes, validation messages, or Export preview labels unreadable.
criteria.reasoning: The observed change notes, validation message, and export preview labels remained readable; no materially unreadable truncation was found. Evidence: copy-error-shared.png
